items.description: A product entity for file attachment metadata.

stx.description: Sync transaction metadata for offline and realtime support, idempotency and HLC-based conflict resolution.

fieldTimestamps.description: Per-field HLC timestamps for scalar fields being changed

publicBucket.description: When true, the file is stored in the public bucket and served from the CDN without a presigned URL.

contentType.description: MIME type of the uploaded file (e.g. image/png).

convertedContentType.description: MIME type of the server-converted variant; null when none.

originalKey.description: Storage object key for the original uploaded file.

convertedKey.description: Storage object key for the converted variant; null when none.

thumbnailKey.description: Storage object key for the generated thumbnail; null when none.

responses.description: Not found: resource does not exist.
responses.name: NotFoundError

convertedKey.description: Storage object key for the converted variant; null when none.

rejectedIds.description: Identifiers of items that could not be processed

rejectionReasons.description: Map of reason code to rejected item IDs
